note: Hotel marketplace slug-based previews. Run: npm run templates:previews:hotel:openai

entries.name: 【事例】ビジネスホテル案内
entries.hint: Business hotel front desk area glimpse through lobby glass, compact urban hotel entrance at night with warm lobby light. Wi-Fi and checkout workflow vibe for business travelers.
entries.styleNotes: Hotel template card hero. Photorealistic 5:3. No readable text, logos, watermarks. Match template theme — onsen NOT salon.
entries.prompt: Hotel guest-guide template listing card hero image. Photorealistic commercial quality, 5:3 horizontal composition (~1920×1152). Experience-forward scene — not a flat centered facade-only shot. No readable text, logos, watermarks, QR codes, or UI overlays. Category: business. Compact city business hotel near a station. Clean lobby threshold, taxi drop-off, or walkway to entrance. Functional, practical, urban — no palm trees or beach resort mood. Template focus (【事例】ビジネスホテル案内): Business hotel front desk area glimpse through lobby glass, compact urban hotel entrance at night with warm lobby light. Wi-Fi and checkout workflow vibe for business travelers. Avoid: blurry, low quality, readable signage, brand logos, watermark.

entries.name: 【事例】温泉旅館・温浴案内
entries.hint: Ryokan with visible onsen bathing culture: wooden bathhouse entrance, steam, stone rotenburo edge, yukata on hanger nearby. Traditional hot spring inn — absolutely NOT a hair salon or beauty parlor.
entries.styleNotes: Hotel template card hero. Photorealistic 5:3. No readable text, logos, watermarks. Match template theme — onsen NOT salon.
entries.prompt: Hotel guest-guide template listing card hero image. Photorealistic commercial quality, 5:3 horizontal composition (~1920×1152). Experience-forward scene — not a flat centered facade-only shot. No readable text, logos, watermarks, QR codes, or UI overlays. Category: ryokan. Traditional Japanese ryokan inn. Wooden lattice, tile roof, stone path, paper lanterns, garden gate. Calm, refined wa aesthetic — not modern glass tower, not tropical resort. Template focus (【事例】温泉旅館・温浴案内): Ryokan with visible onsen bathing culture: wooden bathhouse entrance, steam, stone rotenburo edge, yukata on hanger nearby. Traditional hot spring inn — absolutely NOT a hair salon or beauty parlor. Avoid: blurry, low quality, readable signage, brand logos, watermark.

entries.prompt: Hotel guest-guide template listing card hero image. Photorealistic commercial quality, 5:3 horizontal composition (~1920×1152). Same-day updates mood. Avoid: blurry, low quality, readable signage, brand logos, watermark.

MUST NOT show hair salon, beauty parlor, styling chairs, salon mirrors, or hairdresser.
